title: Easy Recipes
description: So Easy Recipes is a data pack that aims to make some vanilla Minecraft items have recipes or make recipes easier.
body:
So Easy Recipes is a data pack that aims to make some vanilla Minecraft items have recipes or make recipes easier. Um yea thats just about it. I will add more recipes in the furture so people can craft other stuff or craft easier stuff along with advancments! you can also get early acess to the datapack by joining my horror minecraft server! this datapack is bascilly just to make recipes easier or add more recipes to vanilla minecraft.

All Recipes:
Ender Peral
All chain armor
Name Tag
Enchanted Golden Apple
Slime Ball
Saddle
Ghast Tear
Mob Spawner
Calcite
Snow Block
Snow Ball
Gunpowder
Crossbow
Cow Spawn Egg
Zombie Spawn Egg
Skeleton Spawn egg
Creeper Spawn Egg
Spider Spawn Egg
Villager Spawn Egg
Axolotl Spawn Egg
Wolf Spawn Egg
Enderman Spawn egg
Horse Spawn Egg
Warden Spawn Egg
Blaze Spawn Egg
Mushroom Spawn Egg
